reviews.review_title: Used to be good now so unbearably sh!tty
reviews.review_description: This game used to be so good, I am a O g, I decided to reinstall the game because I wanted to see if people still played it and if it has gotten any cool updates in the it's so unbelievably trash, I would rather watch my mom I bleed out, then play it again, there's not even an actual shop anymore, you just climb up a tree, and then under this tent, and there's like, 4 cosmetics and a crappy bundle that cost 5 dollars, no one plays anymore the map is small modes there's no tag, there's nothing to do absolutely nothing and the map isn't even big the map used to be good, it was fun, there was lots of modes you had mods, but the game got rid of your mods and just went to sh_t, I really hope the owners quit because what's the point on working on this game and if you wanted this game don't and sorry u didn't get to experience the peak this game used to be
